conventions: Each executor is a fresh GPT-5.6 Sol one-shot context. Replace __RUN_DIR__, __HTML_STATE_ROOT__, and __OCCUPIED_PORT__ before execution. __HTML_STATE_ROOT__ is the run-local replacement for ~/.html; real ~/.html is off-limits. Servers bind only to 127.0.0.1, record their PID, and are terminated by the harness after verification. Every complete user-facing message is saved verbatim in transcript.md. No-skill arms forbid every installed skill.

evals.name: new-decision-dashboard
evals.prompt: Use /html to turn __RUN_DIR__/inputs/operations-brief.md into a durable decision dashboard. For this isolated run, use __HTML_STATE_ROOT__ instead of ~/.html. Create a new three-random-word lowercase slug, build one self-contained index.html, serve it only on 127.0.0.1 using a free non-common port, verify the exact page, and give me the result.
evals.expected_output: A source-faithful, accessible, responsive single-file dashboard in one new run-local slug directory, served and verified on loopback, followed by only its absolute file path and local URL.

evals.name: named-in-place-revision
evals.prompt: Use /html to revise the existing quiet-canyon-lantern artifact according to __RUN_DIR__/inputs/revision-request.md. For this isolated run, __HTML_STATE_ROOT__ replaces ~/.html and already contains the artifact. Update it in place, preserve unrelated user-authored content, serve it only on 127.0.0.1 using a free non-common port, verify the revised page, and give me the result.
evals.expected_output: The existing run-local artifact is revised in place with exact new facts and preserved custom content, no second slug is created, and the verified path and loopback URL are returned concisely.

evals.name: interactive-source-grounded-artifact
evals.prompt: Use /html to build an interface from __RUN_DIR__/inputs/service-requests.json. For this isolated run, use __HTML_STATE_ROOT__ instead of ~/.html. Create a new three-random-word lowercase slug. The single page must show all supplied records, useful summary counts, and keyboard-accessible controls for filtering by team and status without external dependencies. Serve it only on 127.0.0.1 using a free non-common port, verify the exact page, and give me the result.
evals.expected_output: A complete self-contained interactive artifact that preserves all eight fictional records and supports accessible client-side filtering, with a verified loopback URL and concise final response.

evals.name: occupied-port-recovery
evals.prompt: Use /html to turn __RUN_DIR__/inputs/contact-card.md into a compact incident contact artifact. For this isolated run, use __HTML_STATE_ROOT__ instead of ~/.html and create a new three-random-word lowercase slug. Candidate port __OCCUPIED_PORT__ is already occupied by a run-local listener: recover by choosing another free non-common port, bind only to 127.0.0.1, verify the exact page, and give me the result.
evals.expected_output: A source-faithful single-file contact artifact served on a different free loopback port after the collision, with the exact page verified and no lingering eval server.
